files.purpose: App entry point and the ideas list page.
files.runs_when: Every time the app home page is opened.
depended_on_by: Every visitor — this is the front door.
files.test_after_change: Load the list with zero, one, and many ideas; confirm ordering and the empty state.

files.purpose: Renders the New idea form and handles the submit.
files.runs_when: Opening the New idea form and submitting it.
files.test_after_change: Create an idea with and without a title; confirm validation and that it appears in the list.

files.purpose: Handles a status-change POST for one idea.
files.runs_when: The operator changes an idea's status.
files.test_after_change: Transition an idea through each allowed status; confirm invalid values are rejected.

files.purpose: Streams every idea as a downloadable CSV.
files.test_after_change: Export ideas whose notes contain commas, quotes, and newlines; open the file in a spreadsheet.

files.purpose: Validation and application rules for ideas (valid idea, allowed status set).
files.runs_when: On every create and status change.
files.test_after_change: Re-run create and status-change flows; confirm both valid and invalid inputs behave.

files.purpose: All SQL for the ideas table: insert, find, all, updateStatus.
files.runs_when: On every read or write of an idea.
files.test_after_change: Exercise list, detail, create, status change, and export; watch for read/write field drift.

files.purpose: Opens the SQLite file and returns the shared PDO connection.
files.runs_when: The first database access in a request.
files.test_after_change: Confirm the app connects with IDEAS_DB_PATH set and unset; check file creation on a fresh path.

files.purpose: Applies unapplied numbered SQL migrations in order and records them.
files.runs_when: Run by the operator on purpose; never on a page load.
files.test_after_change: Run against a fresh and an up-to-date database; confirm idempotence.

files.purpose: Renders the list rows and the empty state.
files.test_after_change: Visually check rows and empty state at a narrow width.

files.purpose: Reads environment configuration, including IDEAS_DB_PATH and the dev/prod error mode.
files.test_after_change: Confirm the app still finds the database and that production hides error detail.
